title: Asia Centric: How AI and Energy Security Fuel a New Supercycle
title_cn: 以亚洲为中心：人工智能和能源安全如何推动新的超级循环
summary: A massive convergence of artificial intelligence, energy and security is sparking what is likely to be the largest and longest energy investment cycle in history, according to Morgan Stanley. Driven by the demands of AI data centers and a strategic shift from “just-in-time” cost efficiency to “just-in-case” resilience, more than $5 trillion in new-energy investments is projected for Asia over the next five years.

summary: Oil climbed and government bonds fell after the US and Iran launched a fresh round of attacks, escalating tensions in the Middle East. Gold and silver declined.

title: Japan’s Five-Year Bond Sale Sees Decent Demand on Higher Yields
title_cn: 日本五年期债券发行对高收益需求旺盛
summary: Demand at Japan’s five-year bond sale on Thursday was broadly in line with recent auctions, showing that elevated yields are attracting some buyers.

title_cn: 高盛表示霍尔木兹火山爆发可能会延迟石油供应的恢复
summary: A recovery in Middle Eastern oil supplies could be set back if renewed tensions disrupt shipping in the Strait of Hormuz, Goldman Sachs Group Inc. said.

title: China Asks Bankers to Avoid Underwriting Short-Term LGFV Bonds
title_cn: 中国要求银行家避免承销短期地方政府融资平台债券
summary: China is steering municipal borrowers away from issuing short-term bonds in the domestic market, according to people familiar with the matter, in its latest bid to curb fundraising by weaker issuers.

title: The Memorandum of Misunderstanding’s Margin of Error
title_cn: 误解备忘录的误差范围
summary: Markets have a situation they can live with as long as one big line isn’t crossed.

summary: Temasek International CIO Rohit Sipahimalani discusses investment opportunities and warns that a surge in US capital spending could create risks for markets in a wide-ranging interview with Bloomberg's Haslinda Amin. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Extends Gain as Fresh US Strikes Against Iran Rattle Market
title_cn: 美国对伊朗的新打击扰乱市场，油价扩大涨幅
summary: Oil extended a surge as the US struck targets in Iran for a second day, raising risks for energy supplies from the Middle East.

title: Hormuz Ship Traffic Grinds to a Near Halt After US, Iran Strikes
title_cn: 美国和伊朗袭击后霍尔木兹船舶交通几乎停止
summary: Traffic through the Strait of Hormuz came to a near standstill on Thursday, after the US struck Iran for a second straight day as a fragile truce between the two sides looked increasingly shaky.

title: Copper Rises as Risk Assets Shrug Off More US Strikes on Iran
title_cn: 风险资产摆脱美国对伊朗更多打击的影响，铜价上涨
summary: Copper snapped a two-day loss as it shrugged off a fresh round of US strikes on Iran to focus on optimism over a longer-term demand boost from artificial intelligence.

title: Adani Pressed by Judge for More Details on DOJ Move to Drop Case
title_cn: 法官向阿达尼施压，要求其提供有关司法部撤销案件的更多细节
summary: A US judge pressed Gautam Adani for more details on the Justice Department’s move to dismiss a blockbuster criminal case against the Indian billionaire.

title: Apple Supplier Luxshare Drops After $3 Billion Hong Kong Debut
title_cn: 苹果供应商立讯精密在香港上市 30 亿美元后股价下跌
summary: Apple Inc. supplier Luxshare Precision Industry Co. fell in Hong Kong trading debut on Thursday after raising HK$24.3 billion ($3.1 billion) in the city’s biggest listing this year so far.

title: BOK’s Shin Sees Need for Rate Hike Ahead of Next Week’s Meeting
title_cn: 韩国央行 Shin 认为有必要在下周会议之前加息
summary: Bank of Korea Governor Shin Hyun Song told parliament that policy rates will need to rise at an appropriate time, reinforcing the bank’s hawkish stance just a week before a widely expected rate hike.

title: Chief Future Officer: Kate Gulliver, Wayfair
title_cn: 首席未来官：Kate Gulliver，Wayfair
summary: This episode profiles Wayfair CFO Kate Gulliver, who is leading the home goods retailer's efforts to achieve profitable growth during a challenging period for the housing market -- as well as launching a new initiative to open brick-and-mortar flagship stores. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Japan's Top Eyewear Maker is Passing Inflation Test
title_cn: 日本顶级眼镜制造商如何通过通胀考验
summary: JINS rose to prominence 25 years ago with its bargain-basement ¥4,990 eyeglasses, becoming a household name for cheap chic as falling or stagnant prices took hold. Now, the Tokyo-based lensmaker is positioning itself to take advantage of the shift toward greater pricing power by opening up stores in ritzy venues and by offering a wider price range. Bloomberg’s Reed Stevenson reports from Tokyo. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Launches Strikes on Iran for Second Straight Day
title_cn: 美国连续第二天对伊朗发动打击
summary: The US military said it struck Iran for the second straight day, an escalation of violence that threatens to strain an already fragile ceasefire. Bloomberg's Jeff Mason has the latest developments. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NZ Manufacturing Hits 5-Year High as Breman Highlights Recovery
title_cn: 不莱曼强调复苏，新西兰制造业创五年新高
summary: New Zealand manufacturing expanded at the fastest pace in almost five years in June as central bank Governor Anna Breman pointed to a burgeoning economic recovery, underscoring this week’s decision to raise interest rates.

title: High Yields Set Stage for More Global Bond Inflow Into Indonesia
title_cn: 高收益为更多全球债券流入印度尼西亚奠定了基础
summary: Global inflows into Indonesian sovereign bonds are poised to extend, with investors saying they see value in some of emerging Asia’s highest yields on bets that a bruising round of interest-rate hikes is nearly over.

title: Blackstone’s QTS Markets Data Center-Backed Loan
title_cn: Blackstone 的 QTS Markets 数据中心支持贷款
summary: A unit of Blackstone-backed QTS Realty Trust LLC is seeking to raise $2 billion to repay debt tied to US data centers and fund a distribution.

title: Damaged Manhattan Tower Owner to Reconstruct 15 Floors After Evacuation
title_cn: 受损的曼哈顿塔业主疏散后将重建 15 层
summary: The developer behind the Midtown Manhattan tower that was evacuated over structural concerns Tuesday says it has a plan to fix the issue, including reconstructing 15 floors that were added to the original building as part of its conversion into apartments.

title: Gold Holds Decline as US Strikes on Iran Magnify Inflation Risks
title_cn: 由于美国对伊朗的打击放大了通胀风险，金价保持下跌
summary: Gold held a decline as a second day of US strikes against Iran drove energy prices higher and intensified concerns around inflation.

title: Samsung, SK Hynix and Leveraged ETFs Drive 70% of Korea Trading
title_cn: 三星、SK 海力士和杠杆 ETF 推动了韩国 70% 的交易
summary: Retail fervor over leveraged ETFs in South Korea has grown so intense that the products, together with the two chipmaker stocks they track, now make up more than 70% of trading value in the $4.3 trillion market.

title: Noteholders to Aston Martin Sign Cooperation Pact Amid Debt Rout
title_cn: 阿斯顿·马丁债券持有人在债务危机中签署合作协议
summary: A group of creditors to luxury car maker Aston Martin has signed a cooperation pact as earnings pressure weighs on the company’s debt.

title: Harley-Davidson’s Credit Ratings Get Cut to Junk By S&P
title_cn: 标准普尔将哈雷戴维森的信用评级下调至垃圾级
summary: S&P Global Ratings cut Harley-Davidson Inc.’s credit grades to junk status on Wednesday, citing the company’s strategy to start selling lower-cost motorcycles to boost revenue.

title: Fmr. HUD Secretary on Toyota’s Texas Shift, Mexico Trade
title_cn: 先生。 HUD 部长谈丰田德克萨斯州转型和墨西哥贸易
summary: Henry Cisneros, former US Department of Housing and Urban Development Secretary and former Mayor of San Antonio, discussed the origins and significance of Toyota's investment in San Antonio. He recounted how Toyota executives chose San Antonio for a new plant after observing the high number of pickup trucks at a Dallas Cowboys game, indicating strong local demand. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says Ukraine Can Make Patriot Missiles
title_cn: 特朗普称乌克兰可以制造爱国者导弹
summary: American Enterprise Institute Senior Fellow Angela Stent  discusses President Trump's announcement he would allow Ukraine to make its own Patriot Missiles. She says Trump "sees that Ukraine looks like a winner, that it has cards that the Ukrainians are really fighting back." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: 【今朝の5本】仕事を始める前に読んでおきたい厳選ニュース
title_cn: 【今早5篇】精选上班前必读新闻
summary: ​威嚇強める、FOMC議事要旨、テック起債、BofA姿勢転換、世界成長見通し

title: Oil Soars as US Extends Strikes Against Iran Into Second Night
title_cn: 美国将对伊朗的打击延长至第二天晚上，油价飙升
summary: Oil jumped to a two-week high amid renewed US attacks on Iran and President Donald Trump’s assessment that the interim peace deal is a dead letter, heightening concerns about the free flow of crude from a key energy-producing region.

title: China’s Reflation Shows Signs of Peaking as Iran War Shock Fades
title_cn: 随着伊朗战争冲击消退，中国通货再膨胀显示见顶迹象
summary: China’s reflationary momentum showed signs of stalling in June, a reminder that the outlook for domestic prices is fragile as the economy emerges from deflation after an easing of tensions over Iran led to a pullback in commodity costs.

title: China Chipmaker CXMT to Launch $4.3 Billion IPO Next Week
title_cn: 中国芯片制造商长鑫存储将于下周启动 43 亿美元的 IPO
summary: Memory giant CXMT Corp. will open investor subscriptions for its public offering next week, kicking off the final stage of China’s most highly anticipated listing of the year.

title: Australia Rail Services Resuming After Telstra Outage
title_cn: 澳大利亚铁路服务在 Telstra 断电后恢复
summary: Disrupted rail services in Australia were starting to resume Thursday, after a Telstra Group Ltd. network outage knocked out mobile and data services across the country a day earlier and halted trains in some areas.

title: Recruiters Shift Focus to Specialized AI Jobs to Stay Relevant
title_cn: 招聘人员将重点转向专门的人工智能工作以保持相关性
summary: Recruitment companies, facing the threat of artificial intelligence tools replacing human labor and customers embracing AI-assisted applicant screening, are adapting by honing in on niche, in-demand jobs in the AI economy.

title: ADB Chief Economist on APAC Growth Outlook
title_cn: 亚行首席经济学家谈亚太地区增长前景
summary: Albert Park, Chief Economist at the Asian Development Bank, discusses the bank’s latest APAC growth outlook. The forecast sees growth staying subdued despite a modest improvement, as disruptions from the Middle East conflict continue to weigh on supply chains and production costs. He speaks with Shery Ahn on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ispace CEO on Lunar Transportation Plans With SpaceX
title_cn: Ispace 首席执行官与 SpaceX 探讨月球运输计划
summary: Takeshi Hakamada, Founder and CEO at Ispace, discusses the company's plans to to create a lunar payload service to be launched aboard a SpaceX Starship rocket. He speaks with Shery Ahn on Bloomberg: The Asia Trade. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Zhipu Surges 22% After $4 Billion Share Sale Priced at Low End
title_cn: 以低端价格出售 40 亿美元股票后，智浦股价飙升 22%
summary: Shares in Chinese artificial-intelligence model maker Zhipu surged as much as 22% in Hong Kong on Thursday after the company priced a $4 billion share sale at the low end of the marketed range.

title: How Wayfair Has Built AI Into Its Future
title_cn: Wayfair 如何将人工智能融入未来
summary: Furniture and home goods retailer Wayfair has built a thriving e-commerce platform that's been incorporating advanced technologies throughout its 25-year history. On Bloomberg Chief Future Officer, CFO Kate Gulliver tells Carol Massar how the company is now using AI to improve the customer experience and enhance internal business processes. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Wayfair's Big Bet on Bricks and Mortar
title_cn: Wayfair 对实体店的大赌注
summary: Wayfair is building on its success as an e-commerce furniture and home goods retailer with a move into large-format brick-and-mortar stores. On Bloomberg Chief Future Officer, CFO Kate Gulliver shows Carol Massar around Wayfair's new Atlanta store, and explains how this new initiative is helping the company create a seamless omnichannel "clicks to bricks" shopping experience. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bain Capital Exits Kioxia After Chip Deal Yields Big Returns
title_cn: 芯片交易带来丰厚回报后，贝恩资本退出 Kioxia
summary: Bain Capital has sold its entire stake in flash memory chipmaker Kioxia Holdings Corp., closing a chapter on a deal that’s transformed the Japanese tech and investment landscape.

title: Iluvatar CoreX Raises $902 Million After 257% Stock Rally
title_cn: Iluvatar CoreX 股价上涨 257% 后筹集 9.02 亿美元
summary: Shanghai Iluvatar CoreX Semiconductor Co. raised about $902 million from a share sale in Hong Kong after its stock soared since an initial public offering in January.

title: IMF Raises S. Korea Growth Most Among Major Economies on AI Boom
title_cn: 国际货币基金组织认为韩国是主要经济体中人工智能繁荣增长最快的国家
summary: South Korea’s growth outlook received the biggest upgrade among the world’s 30 major economies in the International Monetary Fund’s latest projections, adding to evidence that the country’s artificial intelligence-driven semiconductor boom is overpowering the economic hit from the Middle East conflict.

title: AI Costs Lead Westpac to Prod Staff Toward ‘Sensible’ Model Use
title_cn: 人工智能成本导致西太平洋银行鼓励员工“合理”使用模型
summary: Westpac Banking Corp. is intensifying efforts to monitor artificial intelligence costs, as the Australian lender closely tracks AI tokens across the firm and routes simpler tasks to cheaper models.

title: China to Let AI Firms Buy Nvidia H200s, Information Says
title_cn: 有消息称，中国将允许人工智能公司购买 Nvidia H200
summary: China plans to allow top artificial intelligence companies to buy a limited amount of H200 chips from Nvidia Corp., a sign the country is easing restrictions on the coveted US technology, according to the Information.

title: Nvidia Rival Positron Holds Talks to Raise Funds at $5 Billion Valuation
title_cn: Nvidia 竞争对手 Positron 举行融资谈判，估值达 50 亿美元
summary: AI chip startup Positron is in talks to raise about $750 million in financing during a round with two phases, part of a groundswell of companies looking to compete with Nvidia Corp.

title: Nasdaq 100 Fluctuates Amid Geopolitical Tensions | The Close 7/8/2026
title_cn: 纳斯达克 100 指数在地缘政治紧张局势中波动 |收盘价 7/8/2026
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Nuveen Head of Fixed Income Strategy Tony Rodriguez, State Street Global Head of Gold Strategy Aakash Doshi, Coresight Research Founder & CEO Deborah Weinswig, Principal Venture Partners Founder & Managing Partner Songyee Yoon, Alphasimplex Chief Research Strategist Katy Kaminski, Principal Asset Management Chief Investment Officer & Global Head of Equities George Maris, Morgan Stanley Equity Research Managing Director Alex Straton, MNTN CEO Mark Douglas, & Former HUD Sectretary Henry Cisneros.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Early-Stage VC Founder: AI Race Is Now About Efficiency
title_cn: 早期风险投资创始人：AI竞赛现在关乎效率
summary: In this segment, Songyee Yoon, Director on HP's Board and Founder of Principal Venture Partners, discusses the emerging divergence between the chip cycle and the hyperscaler cycle amid the AI build-out. She highlights the critical issue of whether hyperscalers will reduce their spending as the costs of AI infrastructure escalate, a factor that could significantly impact the broader AI investment landscape and equity market performance. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meta to Build First Data Center in Canada, Expanding Global Fleet
title_cn: Meta 将在加拿大建立第一个数据中心，扩大全球机队
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. will invest around $10 billion to build its first data center in Canada as the company expands its infrastructure to support its artificial intelligence ambitions.

title: MNTN CEO: We’re Over-Building Data Centers in the US
title_cn: MNTN首席执行官：我们在美国过度建设数据中心
summary: Mark Douglas, CEO of the ad tech company MNTN, discussed Meta's reported ambitions to expand beyond advertising into cloud infrastructure. Douglas expressed skepticism about Meta's ability to compete with established cloud providers like AWS and Google Cloud, citing high switching costs for customers and Meta's lack of excess AI infrastructure capacity to monetize. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Deals 7/8/2026
summary: A weekly, midday program that delivers high-impact, editorially driven coverage of the most important corporate transactions shaping the global market. Today's guests: Paul Weiss Global Co-head of M&A Krish Veeraraghavan and Alix Partners Partner & Managing Director Grace Lee. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Judge Allows SEC-Musk Deal Despite ‘Significant Misgivings’
title_cn: 尽管存在“重大疑虑”，美国法官仍允许 SEC 与马斯克达成交易
summary: A US judge signed off on Elon Musk paying $1.5 million to end a Securities and Exchange Commission lawsuit that accused him of cheating Twitter Inc. investors when he missed a deadline in 2022 to disclose his growing stake in the company.

title: Apple’s Chip Deal With Broadcom Expected to Top $30 Billion
title_cn: 苹果与博通的芯片交易预计将突破 300 亿美元
summary: Apple Inc., following through on a pledge to boost spending on US-made components, said its expanded agreement with Broadcom Inc. is expected to top $30 billion.

title: India’s JioStar Taps AI for Shopping, TV Movie Night Ideas
title_cn: 印度 JioStar 利用人工智能实现购物、电视电影之夜创意
summary: JioStar is betting that conversations with viewers powered by generative AI will become a powerful tool for the streaming TV company.

title: BofA Bankers U-Turn on OpenAI
title_cn: 美国银行银行家对 OpenAI 掉头
summary:
Bloomberg's Liana Baker joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." Bank of America handed a $520 million credit line to OpenAI in recent weeks after previously spurning the artificial intelligence giant’s request, according to people with knowledge of the matter.
. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sonos Cuts Top Design and Product Executives as Part of Layoffs
title_cn: 作为裁员的一部分，Sonos 裁减了顶级设计和产品主管
summary: Sonos Inc. has pushed out some of its top design and product management executives as part of job cuts in recent weeks, raising questions about the company’s ability to develop breakthrough products beyond its short-term hardware road map of safe bets.

title: AI Chip Startup Raises Funds at $11B Valuation
title_cn: AI 芯片初创公司以 11B 美元估值筹集资金
summary:
Bloomberg's Ryan Gould joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." Chip startup SambaNova has raised $1 billion at an $11 billion valuation, underscoring investors’ conviction in rising demand for infrastructure tied to artificial intelligence.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BofA Makes U-Turn on OpenAI, Provides $520M Credit Line
title_cn: 美国银行对 OpenAI 掉头，提供 5.2 亿美元信贷额度
summary: Bank of America is changing its tune on OpenAI: after initially passing on lending to the AI company, it is now extending a $520 million credit line, according to sources. Bloomberg's Sridhar Natarajan joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Incredible Demand for Inferencing at High Speeds: SambaNova CEO
title_cn: 对高速推理的巨大需求：SambaNova 首席执行官
summary: Chip startup SambaNova raised $1 billion at an $11 billion valuation, underscoring investors’ conviction in rising demand for infrastructure tied to AI. SambaNova CEO Rodrigo Liang joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Indian Gangster US Says Plotted Killings From Jail
title_cn: 美国印度黑帮称在监狱里策划杀人
summary: A sweeping US dragnet of Indian crime syndicates has brought renewed attention to one of the country’s most notorious crime bosses and his alleged role in carrying out political killings overseas, including of a well-known Sikh activist in Canada.

title: Modi Lauds Close Australia Ties, Aims to Sign Uranium Deal
title_cn: 莫迪赞扬与澳大利亚的密切关系，旨在签署铀协议
summary: Hours before they’ll meet for a summit, the leaders of Australia and India lauded their nations’ close relationship as they pledged to further deepen defense and economic ties, including on the supply of nuclear fuel.

title: The UK Riots Where Online Rage Triggered Real World Chaos
title_cn: 英国骚乱，网络愤怒引发现实世界混乱
summary: How anger and resentment are being manipulated online and weaponized across the UK

title: US Military Launches Strikes on Iran for Second Straight Day
title_cn: 美军连续第二天对伊朗发动袭击
summary: The US military struck Iran for the second straight day, an escalation of violence that threatens efforts to reach a permanent peace deal.

title: Platner Drops Maine Senate Bid After Sexual Assault Allegation
title_cn: 普拉特纳在性侵犯指控后放弃缅因州参议院竞选
summary:
Graham Platner suspended his US Senate campaign in Maine following a sexual assault allegation that caused his support from fellow Democrats to collapse.

His exit throws a crucial race for the party into turmoil. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: New Zealand Aims to Join Military Alliance With Australia, Fiji
title_cn: 新西兰拟与澳大利亚、斐济建立军事联盟
summary: New Zealand will work to join a new military alliance that was signed this week between Australia and Fiji, the latest move in the rapid restructuring of the regional security architecture.

title: Talarico’s $30 Million Haul Crushes Paxton in Texas Senate Race
title_cn: 塔拉里科 (Talarico) 3000 万美元的收入在德克萨斯州参议员竞选中击败帕克斯顿 (Paxton)
summary: Texas Democrat James Talarico received $30 million in second-quarter donations in his campaign for US Senate, more than tripling the amount Republican challenger Ken Paxton amassed in what will be one of the most expensive campaigns of the November midterm elections.

title: Democratic Infighting Puts Party’s Midterm Targets at Risk
title_cn: 民主内斗使党的中期目标面临风险
summary: With President Donald Trump and Republicans on the defensive over the cost of groceries, gasoline, housing and healthcare, Democrats expected to spend the summer building momentum ahead of the midterm elections.

title: Platner Suspends Maine Senate Bid After Assault Allegation
title_cn: 袭击指控后普拉特纳暂停缅因州参议院竞选
summary: Graham Platner suspended his US Senate campaign in Maine following a sexual assault allegation that caused his support from fellow Democrats to collapse, throwing a crucial race for the party into turmoil.

title: Anutin Awaits Thai Court Ruling on $12 Billion Crisis Funding
title_cn: 阿努丁等待泰国法院对 120 亿美元危机资金的裁决
summary: Thai Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul is awaiting a crucial court ruling over whether roughly $12 billion of crisis borrowing is constitutional or not, a decision that could determine the fate of his flagship economic stimulus and energy transition agendas.

title: Trump Says US Not Stopping Machado’s Return to Venezuela
title_cn: 特朗普称美国不会阻止马查多返回委内瑞拉
summary: President Donald Trump denied preventing Venezuelan opposition leader María Corina Machado from returning to her country after the recent devastating earthquakes, a move that could pose a direct challenge to acting President Delcy Rodríguez.

title: Platner Campaign Revs Up Maine Backers for Fight on Replacement
title_cn: 普拉特纳竞选活动动员缅因州支持者为替代斗争而奋斗
summary: Maine US Senate candidate Graham Platner’s campaign began mobilizing his supporters for a potential struggle over choosing a replacement Democratic nominee as he faces mounting pressure to drop out of the election in the wake of a sexual assault allegation.

title: Trump Says Troop Levels in Europe Will Depend on Greenland, Iran
title_cn: 特朗普称欧洲驻军人数将取决于格陵兰岛和伊朗
summary: President Donald Trump said a decision on US troop levels in Europe would hinge on how allies addressed his concerns over Greenland and the Iran war, comments likely to intensify NATO members’ worries about over his commitment to collective security.

title: Trump Returns on Old AF1 Instead of Qatari Jet | Balance of Power: Late Edition 07/08/2026
title_cn: 特朗普乘坐旧款AF1而不是卡塔尔喷气机返回权力平衡：最新版 07/08/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Former US Ambassador to NATO Kurt Volker reacts to the second round of strikes against Iran, saying the MOU with Tehran was "never" the end-all-be-all. Jim Messina, founder and CEO of The Messina Group and manager of the Obama 2012 re-election campaign, says Graham Platner's "career in politics is done" after months of turmoil surrounding his campaign and sexual assault allegations that Platner has denied. Retired US Air Force Lieutenant General David Deptula says President Trump's renewed strikes against Iran are "not necessarily escalatory," but rather a "smart reaction" meant to make clear to Tehran that violations of any agreement will "make its situation worse". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pentagon Urges Latin American Countries to Raise Defense Budget
title_cn: 五角大楼敦促拉丁美洲国家增加国防预算
summary: The US Department of Defense is pressuring Latin American nations to increase security spending to fight organized crime.

title: Ret. Lt. Gen.: Trump's Iran Strikes a 'Smart Reaction'
title_cn: 退休。中将：特朗普领导下的伊朗做出了“明智的反应”
summary: Retired US Air Force Lieutenant General David Deptula says President Trump's renewed strikes against Iran are "not necessarily escalatory," but rather a "smart reaction" meant to make clear to Tehran that violations of any agreement will "make its situation worse". He also reacts to President Trump's move to return home from Turkey on an older Air Force One, saying the decision likely reflected security, survivability, communications and operational caution. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says Spain Agreed to Pay More After Trade Embargo Threat
title_cn: 特朗普称西班牙同意在贸易禁运威胁后支付更多费用
summary: President Donald Trump said Spain, a NATO partner, agreed to pay more after he threatened them with a trade embargo during the bloc’s summit.

title: Campaign Strategist: Platner's Political Career Is 'Done'
title_cn: 竞选策略师：普拉特纳的政治生涯已经“结束”
summary: Jim Messina, founder and CEO of The Messina Group and manager of the Obama 2012 re-election campaign, says Graham Platner's "career in politics is done" after months of turmoil surrounding his campaign and sexual assault allegations that Platner has denied. Messina says Platner should not get to decide Maine Democrats' nominee, arguing voters and the party need an open, transparent process to choose a replacement in a race he says Democrats likely need to win to flip the Senate. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Lawmakers Demand Veto on Appointments After Mandelson Scandal
title_cn: 曼德尔森丑闻后英国议员要求否决任命
summary: British lawmakers have demanded they be given the power to veto the appointments of senior diplomats, after former US ambassador Peter Mandelson was fired amid allegations he leaked market-sensitive information and concealed the extent of his relationship with sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

title: Trump Stops in UK to Switch Air Force One Planes on Trip Home
title_cn: 特朗普在英国停留并换乘空军一号飞机回国
summary: President Donald Trump’s return to the US from the NATO summit in Turkey took a detour when he switched Air Force One planes at a military base in the United Kingdom.

title: Bangladesh Prime Minister Met Labor Tycoon Amin on Malaysia Trip
title_cn: 孟加拉国总理马来西亚之行会见劳工大亨阿明
summary: Bangladeshi Prime Minister Tarique Rahman met Aminul Islam, the businessman the South Asian nation tried to have extradited in 2024 as part of a probe into alleged trafficking of migrant workers, during a state visit to Malaysia in June, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Amb. Volker: Iran MOU Was 'Never' the End-All-Be-All
title_cn: 安布。沃尔克：伊朗谅解备忘录“永远”不是万能的
summary: Former US Ambassador to NATO Kurt Volker reacts to the second round of strikes against Iran, saying the MOU with Tehran was "never" the end-all-be-all. Volker says he sees President Trump's goal as getting Iran back into compliance with open shipping through the Strait of Hormuz — and expects Trump is prepared to "let the rest sit for a while" and deal with the nuclear issue later. Volker also says allowing Ukraine to produce Patriot missiles under US license is "very, very significant," arguing Patriots are the only reliable system for intercepting Russian cruise and ballistic missile strikes on Ukrainian civilians and infrastructure. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Police Probe Donations to 2024 Campaign of Top Farage Ally
title_cn: 英国警方调查法拉奇顶级盟友 2024 年竞选活动的捐款情况
summary: London police are investigating a donation of nearly £40,000 to the 2024 leadership campaign of a prominent Conservative Party politician who earlier this year defected to Nigel Farage’s Reform UK Party.

title: US Launches Strikes on Iran for Second Straight Day
title_cn: 美国连续第二天对伊朗发动打击
summary: The US military is striking Iran for the second straight day to degrade their ability to threaten freedom of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz. Annmarie Hordern reports on "Balance of Power: Evening Edition." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How the New Round of Iran Strikes Could Impact the Energy Market
title_cn: 伊朗新一轮袭击将如何影响能源市场
summary: The US military said it’s striking Iran for the second straight day. Bloomberg Economics' Chris Kennedy explains what this means for the US economy on "Balance of Power: Evening Edition." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump to Seek Supreme Court Rehearing on Birthright Citizenship
title_cn: 特朗普寻求最高法院就出生公民权问题进行复审
summary: President Donald Trump said he would ask the Supreme Court to rehear a case over birthright citizenship, a long-shot bid to undo a ruling that went against his administration.

title: Trump Is Bursting America’s $100 Billion Grad School Bubble
title_cn: 特朗普正在戳破美国 1000 亿美元的研究生院泡沫
summary: Graduate degrees became university cash cows. On today’s Big Take podcast, Bloomberg’s Liam Knox details how the Trump administration is threatening that business model. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Telecom Stock Selloff Shows Competition Is Fierce, FCC’s Carr Says
title_cn: FCC 的卡尔表示，电信股抛售表明竞争非常激烈
summary: Federal Communications Commission Chairman Brendan Carr said a recent decline in the share prices of wireless carriers is a sign that competition for telecommunications services is heating up, driven in part by the Trump administration’s policies.

title: Trump Says US to Remove Syria From Terrorism Sanctions List
title_cn: 特朗普称美国将把叙利亚从恐怖主义制裁名单中删除
summary: President Donald Trump said the US would remove Syria from the terrorism sanctions list as he met with the country’s president, Ahmed al-Sharaa, on the sidelines of the NATO summit.

title: ‘Project 2029’ Floats Free Child Care — or $1,000 to Stay Home
title_cn: “Project 2029”推出免费托儿服务 –或 1,000 美元留在家里
summary: The next US president should endorse publicly funded child care for all — or a $1,000 monthly credit for families with young children that don’t utilize it — according to a possible early blueprint for Democrats.
